cloud_function.description: Specifies the name of the Cloud Function to which the IAM binding will be applied.

condition.description: Defines an IAM condition that restricts the binding of the role to specific attributes, such as request time or resource name. Must be expressed in Common Expression Language (CEL) syntax.

location.description: Specifies the region where the Cloud Function IAM binding will be applied; must match the location of the Cloud Function.

members.description: List of IAM members to be granted the specified role for the Cloud Function, formatted as user, group, or serviceAccount.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be applied to the Cloud Function, must be in the format of 'roles/roleName'.
